nodes.name: Schedule: Daily 04:30
nodes.notes: 30 мин после Flow 4 (04:00) чтобы не конкурировать за LLM.

nodes.name: Apify: XING Jobs
nodes.notes:
Запускает XING actor синхронно (waitForFinish=300s).
Актор: найти на apify.com/store → поиск 'xing jobs'.
Записать ID в .env как APIFY_XING_ACTOR_ID.
Ответ: { defaultDatasetId, status, ... }

nodes.name: Apify: Fetch XING Results
nodes.notes:
Забирает результаты из датасета Apify.
Отдаёт массив объектов — один объект = одна вакансия.

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM jobs WHERE source_url = $1 AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

parameters.jsCode:
const ni = $('Normalize: Apify Job').item.json.normalized_input;
return [{ json: { normalized_input: ni, hard_injection_detected: 'no' } }];

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen/qwen3-30b-a3b-instruct-2507', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: $env.JOBRADAR_SYSTEM_PROMPT }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify($json.normalized_input) }] }) }}

parameters.query:
WITH
co AS (
  INSERT INTO companies (company_id, name, meta)
  VALUES ({{ $json.db.company_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.company_name_sql }}, '{}')
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, company_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),
em AS (
  INSERT INTO employers (employer_id, company_id, name)
  SELECT {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.company_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.employer_name_sql }}
  WHERE {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }} IS NOT NULL
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, employer_id) DO UPDATE SET name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, employers.name), updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id
),
j AS (
  INSERT INTO jobs (
    job_id_fuzzy, company_id, employer_id, job_title, location, seniority,
    work_mode, work_mode_raw, working_hours, salary_currency, salary_min, salary_max, salary_period,
    tech_stack, key_requirements, current_stage, priority, priority_level,
    interview_date, response_deadline, application_deadline,
    has_had_call, call_count, last_call_date, source_url, source_input, summary
  ) VALUES (
    {{ $json.db.job_id_fuzzy_sql }}, {{ $json.db.company_id_sql }}, {{ $json.db.employer_id_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.job_title_sql }}, {{ $json.db.location_sql }}, {{ $json.db.seniority_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.work_mode_sql }}, {{ $json.db.work_mode_raw_sql }}, {{ $json.db.working_hours_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.salary_currency_sql }}, {{ $json.db.salary_min_sql }}, {{ $json.db.salary_max_sql }}, {{ $json.db.salary_period_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.tech_stack_sql }}, {{ $json.db.key_requirements_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.current_stage_sql }}, {{ $json.db.priority_sql }}, {{ $json.db.priority_level_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.interview_date_sql }}, {{ $json.db.response_deadline_sql }}, {{ $json.db.application_deadline_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.has_had_call_sql }}, {{ $json.db.call_count_sql }}, {{ $json.db.last_call_date_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.source_url_sql }}, {{ $json.db.source_input_sql }}, {{ $json.db.summary_sql }}
  )
  ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, job_id_fuzzy) DO UPDATE SET
    current_stage = EXCLUDED.current_stage, priority = EXCLUDED.priority, priority_level = EXCLUDED.priority_level,
    interview_date = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.interview_date, jobs.interview_date),
    response_deadline = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.response_deadline, jobs.response_deadline),
    application_deadline = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.application_deadline, jobs.application_deadline),
    tech_stack = CASE WHEN array_length(EXCLUDED.tech_stack,1) > 0 THEN EXCLUDED.tech_stack ELSE jobs.tech_stack END,
    source_url = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.source_url, jobs.source_url), summary = EXCLUDED.summary, updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id, job_id_fuzzy, current_stage::text, priority::text, summary, interview_date
),
ev AS (
  INSERT INTO job_events (
    job_id, job_thread_key, job_id_fuzzy, input_source, source_detail,
    category, is_job_related, action, stage, priority, priority_level,
    interview_date, response_deadline, application_deadline,
    call_platform, call_platform_raw, raw_text, parsed_json,
    sender_risk_level, sender_risk_signals
  ) SELECT
    (SELECT id FROM j), {{ $json.db.job_thread_key_sql }}, {{ $json.db.job_id_fuzzy_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.source_input_sql }}, {{ $json.db.source_detail_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.category_sql }}, {{ $json.db.is_job_related_sql }}, {{ $json.db.action_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.current_stage_sql }}, {{ $json.db.priority_sql }}, {{ $json.db.priority_level_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.interview_date_sql }}, {{ $json.db.response_deadline_sql }}, {{ $json.db.application_deadline_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.call_platform_sql }}, {{ $json.db.call_platform_raw_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.raw_text_sql }}, {{ $json.db.parsed_json_sql }},
    {{ $json.db.sender_risk_level_sql }}, {{ $json.db.sender_risk_signals_sql }}
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT (SELECT id FROM j) AS job_id, (SELECT job_id_fuzzy FROM j) AS job_id_fuzzy,
       (SELECT current_stage FROM j) AS stage, (SELECT priority FROM j) AS priority,
       (SELECT summary FROM j) AS summary, (SELECT interview_date FROM j) AS interview_date,
       (SELECT id FROM ev) AS event_id;

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: ['\u{1F4CD} XING: ' + ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.company_name || 'Unknown') + '', ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.job_title || '\u2014'), '', 'Stage: ' + ($json.stage || '') + ' Priority: ' + ($json.priority || '') + '', 'Relevance: ' + ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.relevance_score || '?') + '/100', '', ($json.summary || '')].join('\n') }) }}

nodes.name: ScrapingBee STUB
nodes.notes:
ScrapingBee — headless browser API
Бесплатно: 1000 вызовов/мес
URL: https://app.scrapingbee.com/api/v1/?api_key=KEY&url=TARGET&render_js=true
Документация: https://www.scrapingbee.com/documentation
Активировать: получить API ключ → добавить SCRAPINGBEE_API_KEY в .env

nodes.name: Scraper API STUB
nodes.notes:
Scraper API — прокси + браузер + капча
Бесплатно: 1000 вызовов/мес
URL: http://api.scraperapi.com/?api_key=KEY&url=TARGET&render=true
Документация: https://docs.scraperapi.com
Активировать: scraperapi.com → API ключ → SCRAPERAPI_KEY в .env

nodes.name: Scrapestack STUB
nodes.notes:
Scrapestack — REST API с прокси + автокапча
Бесплатно: 1000 запросов/мес
URL: http://api.scrapestack.com/scrape?access_key=KEY&url=TARGET
Документация: https://scrapestack.com/documentation
Активировать: scrapestack.com → access_key → SCRAPESTACK_KEY в .env

nodes.name: Octoparse STUB
nodes.notes:
Octoparse — no-code cloud scraper
Бесплатно: базовый тариф
Интеграция: Octoparse Cloud API → HTTP Request
Документация: https://helpcenter.octoparse.com/hc/en-us/categories/4407810404249
Активировать: настроить задачу в Octoparse UI → получить Task ID → API ключ

nodes.name: Mozenda STUB
nodes.notes:
Mozenda — корпоративный облачный скрапер
От $250/мес — только для больших объёмов
API: https://mozenda.com/api
Активировать: только при масштабировании до десятков тысяч вакансий/день

nodes.name: ScrapingBot STUB
nodes.notes:
ScrapingBot — множество API (HTML, Real Estate, Retail)
Бесплатно: 100 кредитов
URL: https://api.scraping-bot.io/scrape/raw-html
Документация: https://www.scraping-bot.io/web-scraping-documentation
Активировать: scraping-bot.io → API ключ → SCRAPINGBOT_KEY в .env

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ parent: { database_id: "387e9707-d991-8182-ab7c-d83e9d147dba" }, properties: { Unternehmen: { title: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.company_name || "Unknown") } }] }, Status: { select: { name: "Neu" } }, Stelle: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.job_title || "") } }] }, Gehalt: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: (String($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_min || "") + ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_max ? "-" + $('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_max : "") + ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_currency ? " " + $('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.salary_currency : "")).trim() } }] }, Standort: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.location || "") } }] }, Link: { url: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.source_url || null) }, Notizen: { rich_text: [{ text: { content: ($('Parse LLM Response').item.json.job_event.summary || "").substring(0, 2000) } }] } } }) }}
